title: justicia pelianthia
intro: Justicia pelianthia, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Asian Pigeonwings, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia and India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Justicia pelianthia include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health, among others. Herbal preparations of Justicia pelianthia may include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to alleviate symptoms of stress, anxiety, and insomnia, and to promote overall well-being.
